title: Smart AuthMe Login UI
description: Smart AuthMe Login UI is an add-on for AuthMeReloaded. It keeps AuthMeReloaded’s authentication system and improves the player login/register look and experience with a modern UI.
body:
# Smart AuthMe Login UI

Smart AuthMe Login UI is a **Paper plugin add-on for AuthMeReloaded** that improves the login/register experience with a clean, modern in-game UI.

It does **not replace** AuthMeReloaded authentication.  
It keeps AuthMeReloaded as the core auth system and only upgrades the player-facing login look/UX.

## Features

- Title + subtitle login/register guidance
- Bossbar countdown until authentication timeout
- Optional blindness effect while unauthenticated
- Optional login location teleport and return after auth
- Optional inventory/item interaction restrictions before login
- Command sync (only expected auth command while unauthenticated)
- Optional wrong-password protection and temporary IP ban controls
- Optional ProtocolLib chat prompt filtering
- Premium bypass options using AuthMe API

## Requirements

- **Paper** 
- **AuthMeReloaded** (required)
- **ProtocolLib** (optional, only for chat filtering)

## Privacy

- No analytics or telemetry
- No outbound network requests
- Privacy-safe default configuration for public release
- Optional IP-based protection is configurable by server owners

## Author

- Rahuldeep
